items.title: India has splurged billions on metro trains. But where are the commuters?
items.dek: Without better last-mile connectivity and affordable fares, metro use is unlikely to improve quickly, say experts.
items.body: Without better last-mile connectivity and affordable fares, metro use is unlikely to improve quickly, say experts.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'They told me he was dead': Children born near army base learn truth about UK soldier dads
items.dek: A DNA and legal project has identified the fathers of 20 children born near a military base in Kenya.
items.body: A DNA and legal project has identified the fathers of 20 children born near a military base in Kenya.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why your recycled clothes could end up in this South American desert
items.dek: Old garments from around the world are being discarded in the South American country.
items.body: Old garments from around the world are being discarded in the South American country.
